ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions (Length x Width x Height) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the room in square meters */,
  "theater_capacity" INTEGER /* Theater seating capacity */,
  "schoolroom_capacity" INTEGER /* Schoolroom seating capacity */,
  "conference_capacity" INTEGER /* Conference seating capacity */,
  "u_shape_capacity" INTEGER /* U-Shape seating capacity */,
  "reception_capacity" INTEGER /* Reception capacity */,
  "banquet_capacity" INTEGER /* Banquet capacity */,
  "room_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the room */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the room */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date from which the room is available for booking */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date until which the room is available for booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room being booked */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "booking_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or requirements for the booking */,
  "total_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "setup_preference" TEXT /* Preferred room setup (e.g., theater, schoolroom) */,
  "catering_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if catering is required */,
  "catering_details" TEXT /* Details of the catering if required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, corporate) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, event planner, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the availability is recorded */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot (e.g., '09:00-12:00') */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the room is available */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking related to the availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_availability_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_availability_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation record */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that was canceled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cancellation occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_fee" REAL /* Amount charged for the cancellation */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Wedding, Conference) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Average duration of the event type */,
  "setup_requirements" TEXT /* Specific setup requirements for the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the client */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the service provided */,
  "facilities_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the facilities */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data captured in the report (e.g., JSON format) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, financial, feedback) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
